summary: Stage‑left audience tape captures the night’s wild energy despite a brief power‑cut, delivering an awesome vibe.
review: The recording appears to have been made from stage left and even includes a few seconds of silence when a power main blew, which gives it a raw, in‑the‑moment feel that many soundboard tapes miss. Reviewers praise the sheer sensation of the performance, noting that the atmosphere shines through even though the technical glitch hurts a bit.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 4‑star rating; the show is described positively but the recording has a noticeable dropout, leading to an overall good but not outstanding assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stage‑left audience source; brief power‑cut caused a few seconds of silence. Captures atmosphere well, but the interruption lowers overall clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer focuses on overall feeling rather than song‑by‑song analysis.
